query:
DELETE FROM computations c
                WHERE c.host_chain_id = $1
                  AND c.output_handle = ANY($2::bytea[])
                  AND NOT EXISTS (
                      SELECT 1
                      FROM computations_branch b
                      WHERE b.host_chain_id = c.host_chain_id
                        AND b.output_handle = c.output_handle
                  )
